sections.title: Standard dialogue after completing In Search of the Myreque

lines.speaker: Ivan Strom
lines.text: Is something new and exciting happening?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe. Veliaf has asked me to do some work for him. Hopefully it will benefit you all.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after completing Sins of the Father
Recovering a lost tome of experience

lines.speaker: Ivan Strom
lines.text: [player name]. I have a tome here that I think belongs to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure? You know I'm here if you need anything.

lines.speaker: Ivan Strom
lines.text: I'm fine. Did you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just checking in. I'll leave you be.

lines.speaker: Ivan Strom
lines.text: I have some here, along with a few other things. It will cost you though.
